primary_text:
You love your pet. You dread the vet bill. You are not alone.

76% of Australian pet owners worry about affording vet care. Not because it costs too much. Because you never know what it will cost.

Best for Pet: $50/month. Unlimited consults. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. 24/7 VetChat.

One fee. No surprises. Just better care.

Not insurance. No claims, no excess.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: Love your pet. Dread the bill. Not alone.
description: $50/month. Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental. One fee, no surprises.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Warm close-up of person with pet. Text overlay feels like someone speaking to you directly.
